job_prestige_father: Job prestige, much lower (1) to much higher than father (5)
job_prestige_mother: Job prestige, much lower (1) to much higher than mother (5)
ideology_economic: Views on economic policies, Left (1) to right (5)
effort_reason_poor: Poor because of effort, =1 lack of effort
trust_government: Trust in government, increasing in trust
unequal_opportunities_problem: Inequality of opportunity is a problem, increasing in how much it is a problem
tools_government: Govt ability to increase opportunities, increasing in govt ability
q1_to_q1_effort: Chance from q1 to q1 effort
q1_to_q2_effort: Chance from q1 to q2 effort
q1_to_q3_effort: Chance from q1 to q3 effort
q1_to_q4_effort: Chance from q1 to q4 effort
q1_to_q5_effort: Chance from q1 to q5 effort
low_to_middle_prob_effort: Chance bottom to middle class effort
q1_to_q1_talent: Chance from q1 to q1 talent
q1_to_q2_talent: Chance from q1 to q2 talent
q1_to_q3_talent: Chance from q1 to q3 talent
q1_to_q4_talent: Chance from q1 to q4 talent
q1_to_q5_talent: Chance from q1 to q5 talent
low_to_middle_prob_talent: Chance bottom to middle class talent
government_intervention: Optimal level of government intervention (1 to 7)
level_playing_field_policies: Support equality of opportunities policies, increasing in support
budget_safetynet: Share of budget in safety net
estate_tax_support: Support estate tax, increasing in support
round: Round of September survey (relevant for US)
time_mobility: Time spent on baseline ladder question (seconds)
true_q1_to_q1: Real Chance from q1 to q1
true_q1_to_q2: Real Chance from q1 to q2
true_q1_to_q3: Real Chance from q1 to q3
true_q1_to_q4: Real Chance from q1 to q4
true_q1_to_q5: Real Chance from q1 to q5
flag_2: Flag 2: 100 chance in Q higher than 1
flag_fu: Flag 2: 100 chance in Q higher than 1
